views.view_definition:
WITH movement_stats AS (
         SELECT inventory_movements.inventory_batch_item_id,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (inventory_movements.movement_type = ANY (ARRAY['stock_added'::text, 'correction_increase'::text])) THEN inventory_movements.quantity
                    ELSE 0
                END) AS manual_inflow,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (inventory_movements.movement_type = ANY (ARRAY['walk_in_sale'::text, 'complimentary'::text, 'damaged'::text, 'wasted'::text, 'correction_decrease'::text])) THEN inventory_movements.quantity
                    ELSE 0
                END) AS manual_outflow
           FROM inventory_movements
          GROUP BY inventory_movements.inventory_batch_item_id
        ), order_stats AS (
         SELECT oi.meal_id,
            o.stall_id,
            o.pickup_date,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (o.status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::order_status, 'confirmed'::order_status, 'preparing'::order_status, 'ready'::order_status])) THEN oi.quantity
                    ELSE 0
                END) AS active_reserved,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (o.status = 'picked_up'::order_status) THEN oi.quantity
                    ELSE 0
                END) AS fulfilled,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (o.status = 'cancelled'::order_status) THEN oi.quantity
                    ELSE 0
                END) AS cancelled
           FROM (order_items oi
             JOIN orders o ON ((oi.order_id = o.id)))
          GROUP BY oi.meal_id, o.stall_id, o.pickup_date
        )
 SELECT ibi.id AS inventory_batch_item_id,
    ib.id AS batch_id,
    ibi.meal_id,
    m.name AS item_name,
    ib.stall_id,
    ib.inventory_date,
    ib.window_start,
    ib.window_end,
    ib.status AS batch_status,
    ibi.loaded_quantity,
    (COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint))::integer AS manual_inflow,
    (COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint))::integer AS manual_outflow,
    (COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint))::integer AS active_reserved,
    (COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint))::integer AS fulfilled,
    (COALESCE(os.cancelled, (0)::bigint))::integer AS cancelled,
    ((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)))::integer AS effective_loaded,
    ((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)))::integer AS remaining_physical,
    (((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint)))::integer AS extra_available,
    (GREATEST(((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint)), (0)::bigint))::integer AS customer_available,
        CASE
            WHEN (((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint)) < 0) THEN 'deficit'::text
            WHEN (((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint)) = 0) THEN 'out_of_stock'::text
            WHEN (((((ibi.loaded_quantity + COALESCE(ms.manual_inflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.fulfilled, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(ms.manual_outflow, (0)::bigint)) - COALESCE(os.active_reserved, (0)::bigint)) <= 5) THEN 'low_stock'::text
            ELSE 'available'::text
        END AS stock_status
   FROM ((((inventory_batch_items ibi
     JOIN inventory_batches ib ON ((ibi.inventory_batch_id = ib.id)))
     JOIN meals m ON ((ibi.meal_id = m.id)))
     LEFT JOIN movement_stats ms ON ((ms.inventory_batch_item_id = ibi.id)))
     LEFT JOIN order_stats os ON (((os.meal_id = ibi.meal_id) AND (os.stall_id = ib.stall_id) AND (os.pickup_date = ib.inventory_date))));

SELECT batch_id,
    stall_id,
    inventory_date,
    window_start,
    window_end,
    meal_id,
    item_name,
    customer_available,
        CASE
            WHEN (stock_status = 'deficit'::text) THEN 'out_of_stock'::text
            ELSE stock_status
        END AS stock_status,
    batch_status
   FROM live_inventory_status
  WHERE (batch_status = 'active'::text);
